Host-specific adapters remain required for advanced IDE-native surfaces.
agents-md.next_action: Keep the bounded AGENTS.md block concise and prove idempotent replacement through the consumer projection tests.

limitations: Structural Aider conventions/config proof only; no account-backed runtime/model invocation in automated tests.
No native COS lifecycle hook parity is claimed.
Aider remains rules/context-only; no MCP or hooks are generated.
aider.next_action: Add optional Aider dry-run/model smoke when API credentials are available.

limitations: Structural AGENTS.md/workspace settings proof only; no account-backed Amp runtime invocation in automated tests.
No native COS lifecycle hook parity is claimed.
Workspace MCP servers are empty placeholders and require operator trust/approval.
amp-code.next_action: Add optional Amp runtime smoke when Amp credentials are available.

limitations: Structural Augment/Auggie CLI flag input files proof only; no account-backed Augment runtime invocation in automated tests.
No native COS lifecycle hook parity is claimed.
Files require operator invocation with --rules and --mcp-config; no user-global settings are written.
augment-code.next_action: Add optional Augment/Auggie runtime smoke using auggie --rules .augment/rules/cognitive-os.md --mcp-config .augment/mcp.json when credentials are available.

limitations: Proof currently covers default profile, not full profile.
claude.next_action: Keep default/full projection tests current and add promotion proof for candidate primitives.

limitations: Structural workspace rule proof only; no account-backed Cline runtime invocation in automated tests.
No native COS lifecycle hook parity is claimed.
MCP is not generated until a stable project-local Cline MCP config path is signed.
cline.next_action: Investigate Cline hook/MCP project-local adapter after structural projection is stable.

limitations: Runtime parity depends on Codex-supported hook/settings semantics.
Proof currently covers default profile, not full profile.
codex.next_action: Expand Codex runtime parity proof and full-profile projection proof.

limitations: Structural Continue rules/MCP placeholder proof only; no account-backed IDE runtime invocation in automated tests.
No native COS lifecycle hook parity is claimed.
MCP servers are intentionally empty placeholders.
continue-dev.next_action: Add optional Continue runtime smoke when IDE account/runtime is available.

limitations: Structural project rule/MCP file proof only; no Cursor account-backed runtime invocation in automated tests.
No native COS lifecycle hook parity is claimed.
cursor.next_action: Add optional Cursor runtime smoke once a licensed/manual test host is available.

Generated hooks are empty placeholders; COS hooks are not wired into Factory runtime yet.
factory-droid.next_action: Investigate Factory hook event mapping as a possible future native-lifecycle adapter.

limitations: Structural project settings/context proof only; no account-backed Gemini CLI runtime invocation in automated tests.
No native COS lifecycle hook parity is claimed.
MCP servers are intentionally empty placeholders until profiles configure concrete tools.
gemini-cli.next_action: Add optional Gemini CLI runtime smoke when Gemini CLI credentials are available.

limitations: Supported local projection/config format is not signed in this repo.
google-antigravity.next_action: Research supported projection surface, then add explicit driver and proof.

limitations: Structural Goose project guidance proof only; no account-backed Goose runtime invocation in automated tests.
No native COS lifecycle hook parity is claimed.

goose.next_action: Add optional Goose CLI runtime smoke when provider credentials are available; add MCP only through official Goose extension/config path.

limitations: Structural .junie/AGENTS.md proof only; no account-backed JetBrains IDE runtime invocation in automated tests.

jetbrains-junie.next_action: Add optional Junie runtime smoke when JetBrains IDE account/license is available.

limitations: Structural Kilo project files proof only; no account-backed runtime invocation in automated tests.
No native COS lifecycle hook parity is claimed.

kilo-code.next_action: Add optional Kilo runtime smoke and verify current project config syntax; keep MCP placeholder inside .kilo/kilo.jsonc per official docs.

maintainer_only_defaults.rationale: Scripts remain SO-local unless projected by cos_init.py or listed as profile-driver scripts above.

default.description: Lean default consumer-project profile generated by cos_init.py.

full.description: Full consumer-project profile generated by cos_init.py for maximum primitive availability.

default.description: Projected by default profile for implemented harnesses.

full.description: Projected only by full profile for implemented harnesses.

maintainer-only.description: SO maintainer surface; do not count as consumer-project available unless an explicit projection contract is added.

profile-driver.description: SO-local installer/profile/settings/doctor script whose consumer proof is successful profile projection, not copying the script into the consumer project.

shared.description: Projected in at least one implemented harness/profile and safe to count as consumer-project available.

projection_profiles.purpose: Machine-readable projection profile contract for ACC. Profiles describe which consumer-project primitive surfaces are proven by cos_init.py and which SO-local scripts are profile/install drivers rather than files copied into consumer projects.
